action.reasoning: Observation: custom 3D SchNet-like model achieved test MAE 0.109 (best so far). Val MAE still decreasing at epoch 50. Analysis: increasing model capacity (hidden_dim, layers, RBF) and longer training with better LR schedule should improve further. Time budget allows ~120 epochs (~54 min). Decision: rewrite model_3d.py with hidden_dim=256, n_rbf=50, 4 layers, residual + LayerNorm, and train_3d.py with cosine annealing + warmup, 120 epochs, submit eval.
